pre_game.message: Hey, I'm B. It's a bit intense in here with everyone waiting for the game to start, isn't it? How are you holding up?
Hey B, I'm I. It definitely is, but I'm just trying to stay focused. I really want to make this work for my family. How are you feeling about it all?
Totally get it, I’m in the same boat—doing this for my loved ones too. I’m feeling pretty focused, just ready to get started and see how this all plays out.
Glad we're on the same page. It makes it feel a bit more grounded knowing someone else is here for their family too. What would winning this mean for yours?
It’d mean a lot of pressure off our shoulders and some real security for once; it’s honestly everything.
I really feel that. It's the same for me—just a chance to finally breathe. It's amazing what we'll do for the people we love, right?
Definitely. It makes all the stress worth it if we can actually help them out.
I couldn't agree more. It's why I'm so determined. Let's hope we can both find a way to make it happen.
I’m with you. Let’s stay focused and hopefully we can both make it work for our families.
For sure. Let's make them proud. Good luck, B.
Thanks, I. Good luck to you too, let's do our best for them.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share.
I agree! It was a pleasure working toward a fair outcome where everyone benefited equally.
